positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic neon bioluminescent fox curled around a crescent moon and minimalist constellations. The fox should have sharp, clean lines and a vibrant gradient color scheme (deep indigo, electric teal, magenta). The background is a cosmic void filled with abstract, glowing stellar dust and geometric nebula patterns. The overall style is vaporwave meets art deco tattoo flash, optimized for screen printing on a dark fabric. Highly detailed, vector-art quality, flat yet luminous, rule of thirds balance, central focus.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signature, poor anatomy, ugly, amateur, low resolution, grainy, dirty
